raw_consumer_statement: My American Express accounts were somehow accessed and used by a third party without my knowledge or approval while I was dealing with a serious illness and not able to fully focus on my finances. The accounts became past-due without my knowledge, and Ive gone back and forth with the various companies where my cards were used. The largest charges came from one company and after reaching out to them they agreed to refund all the charges and mark them as fraud as well as have their credit card processorXXXX XXXX send me receipts of the refunds. I did in fact receive these refund receipts from XXXX, but this has now been months since the first refund request and no further communication or refunds have come. I reviewed both my American Express XXXX XXXX XXXX card and my XXXX XXXX American Express charge card and found several other charges that werent authorized by me. I went through each charge and found that all charges not completed with the physical card were fraudulent. All charges that werent either swiped or completed with tap to pay were not authorized by me and should be taken off my account balance. I have attached copies of the refund receipts to this complaint. My XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ends in XXXX and my XXXX XXXX card ends in XXXX
